channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The strategic move CIOs must take to transform procurement
item.description: Many procurement teams are struggling to optimize spend while effectively managing supplier relationships, mitigating supply chain disruptions, and maintaining compliance. Traditional procurement processes – often manual and siloed – can’t keep up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Segway's new lawnbots mow at super-speed and can tackle lawns bigger than football fields
item.description: The new Navimow X3 series robot lawn mowers are designed to mow palatial lawns without getting lost or running out of power.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: I've had it with the current GPU market - and the prices for AMD Radeon partner cards on Best Buy are why
item.description: The GPU market seems to be getting worse every day with inflated prices, and it doesn't look like it'll stop anytime soon.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Google’s new AI tech may know when your house will burn down
item.description: FireSat is a satellite project designed to detect and track wildfires early, aiming to detect a fire that's the size of a classroom within 20 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 Windows features you aren’t using, but should
item.description: Windows is full of useful features, and new elements are constantly coming into the mix. To be sure, Microsoft’s given us plenty of features that aren’t particularly useful. Some things even blink into existence for a short while before vanishing completely.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Rewriting Social Security will be a train wreck
item.description: Government software development is a curious business. When I was a student at the Naval Postgraduate School, I wrote a paper called “There is a Lot of Money to be Made Writing Bad Software for the Federal Government.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Red Hat Developer Hub adds analysis dashboard
item.description: Red Hat has updated Red Hat Developer Hub, an enterprise internal developer portal based on Backstage. The new release offers a developer preview of Adoption Insights, an analytical dashboard that details how Developer Hub is being used by development teams.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Apple fined over €150 million in France for discriminatory consent practices surrounding its ATT framework
item.description: France's antitrust watchdog found that Apple's ATT framework penalized third-party apps. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Modern app delivery requires a continuous approach to security
item.description: At the Tanzu Division of Broadcom, we focus on how our customers can get the most out of cloud native environments while protecting against the slew of new vulnerabilities and attacks targeting their critical business apps.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump calls 'never ending' Signal leak story 'old and boring,' blasts media
item.description: President Trump slammed the media for its “never-ending” coverage of the Signal group chat leak, calling it “old and boring.” In a post Sunday on Truth Social, Trump praised Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: North Korea's suicide drone test
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: China's Tron 1 robot hurdles over obstacles like they're nothing
item.description: Tron 1, a Chinese company's two-legged robot, is versatile and can walk, roll and pivot, even on rough terrain. Tron 1 stands 33 inches tall and weighs 44 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Microsoft abandons data center projects as OpenAI considers its own, hinting at a market shift
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly contemplating building its own data center as Microsoft backs off on its own infrastructure investments. OpenAI has privately discussed building and operating its first data center to house storage, which is essential for developing sophisticated AI models.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI study buddies are boosting grades to new heights
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
